title: feat(landing): refresh hero copy
body:
## Linear

N/A

## Summary

- Refresh the English landing hero headline and prompt placeholder.
- Rename the landing quick actions and More menu options around user outcomes.
- Tighten horizontal padding on the landing category pills.

## Test plan

- [x] Repository frontend guard scripts passed.
- [x] TypeScript type-check passed with Node 24.
- [x] LandingHero targeted tests passed (13 tests).
- [x] Verified the updated copy and layout in the local landing-page preview.
- [ ] Targeted ESLint was unavailable locally because the existing dependency installation could not resolve `@next/eslint-plugin-next`; CI remains authoritative.
